items.question: What is Studio?
items.answer: Studio is the Wink product surface for creating bookable hotel distribution assets from eligible supply.

items.question: Who uses Studio?
items.answer: Hotels and Partners use Studio to create Social Share links, cards, maps, lists, grids, and campaign assets for booking paths.

items.question: Where should visitors go next?
items.answer: Explore Studio on this page or request a demo to see how a Social Share link becomes a confirmed booking with 6-month attribution at 5.5% all-in.

fields.heading: Ready to make hotel demand bookable?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
